job_description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist with 5+ years of experience in Python, machine learning, and deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow or PyTorch). Strong background in NLP and model deployment required. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP) is a plus.
Junior Frontend Developer position for a fast-growing startup. Must know React, TypeScript, and CSS. Exposure to REST APIs and Git workflow expected. 0-2 years experience.
DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience in Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Familiarity with Terraform and cloud infrastructure automation (AWS preferred). 3-5 years of relevant experience.
Seeking a Full Stack Engineer proficient in Node.js, React, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Must be comfortable with microservices architecture and Agile development. 3+ years of experience required.

Business Analyst role requiring strong SQL skills, data visualization expertise (Tableau or Power BI), and stakeholder communication abilities. Experience in financial services domain highly desirable.

Entry level HR coordinator role. Responsibilities include scheduling interviews, onboarding documentation, and employee record management. No technical background required.
notes: Non-technical HR role — expect low match for DS/SWE candidates

job_description: Python Backend Developer with experience in FastAPI or Django, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Must understand REST API design, async programming, and Docker. 2-4 years experience.

Cloud Architect with 8+ years of experience. Must have hands-on with multi-cloud strategy (AWS + Azure), infrastructure-as-code, and enterprise security frameworks. AWS Solutions Architect certification preferred.
Data Engineer responsible for building and maintaining large-scale ETL pipelines using Apache Spark, Airflow, and Snowflake. Experience with dbt and streaming (Kafka) is a bonus. 3+ years.
Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor, detect, and respond to security incidents. Knowledge of SIEM tools, network forensics, and incident response playbooks required. CISSP or CEH a plus.
Product Manager with 4+ years experience driving B2B SaaS products. Strong ability to write PRDs, lead cross-functional teams, and define roadmap based on customer insights. MBA preferred.

Looking for a receptionist for a small law firm. Must have excellent verbal communication, Microsoft Office skills, and professional telephone etiquette. No legal background required.

job_description: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) with 4+ years experience. Must have strong knowledge of Linux, Prometheus, Grafana, and on-call incident management. Experience with Go or Python for automation required.
MLOps Engineer to operationalize ML models at scale. Must know Kubernetes, Docker, MLflow, and cloud platforms (AWS SageMaker preferred). 3+ years experience in model deployment and monitoring.
iOS Developer with Swift and Objective-C expertise. 3+ years building production apps on App Store. Experience with SwiftUI, Core Data, and push notifications required.
QA Engineer to own end-to-end test automation frameworks. Must be proficient in Selenium, pytest, and CI/CD integration. Experience with performance testing (JMeter or Locust) is a plus.
Data Analyst to support business intelligence operations. Must know SQL, Python (pandas, numpy), and have experience building dashboards in Looker or Tableau. 2-4 years experience.
Golang Backend Engineer for a high-throughput fintech platform. Must have 3+ years with Go, gRPC, and PostgreSQL. Familiarity with event-driven systems (Kafka or NATS) and microservices is required.
UX/UI Designer with 3+ years experience designing complex web applications. Must be proficient in Figma, have strong understanding of design systems, and experience conducting user research.

AI Research Scientist with PhD or equivalent experience. Deep knowledge of transformer architectures, RLHF, and large language model fine-tuning required. Publications in top-tier venues preferred. 5+ years.
Platform Engineer to build internal developer tooling and CI/CD infrastructure. Must have experience with GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and Helm charts. Python or Bash scripting required. 3+ years.
Ruby on Rails Developer with 4+ years experience. Must have full-stack capability with Rails, PostgreSQL, and Sidekiq. Experience deploying on Heroku or AWS is a plus.

Scala/Spark Data Engineer to build distributed data processing systems. Strong knowledge of Apache Spark, Scala, and Hadoop ecosystem required. Experience with Delta Lake or Iceberg is a plus. 4+ years.
Security Engineer focused on application security. Must have experience in OWASP Top 10, penetration testing, and secure code review. Knowledge of SAST/DAST tools required. 3+ years experience.

Technical Program Manager (TPM) to drive large-scale engineering initiatives at a top tech company. 6+ years experience managing cross-functional projects. Strong understanding of Agile and SDLC required.

Embedded Systems Engineer with experience in C/C++ and RTOS. Must have worked on IoT devices, firmware development, and hardware-software integration. Knowledge of communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C) required.

Staff Software Engineer to architect scalable backend systems and mentor other engineers. Must have 8+ years in backend engineering, distributed systems, and technical leadership. Experience with system design at scale required.
Cloud Security Engineer to design and implement security controls in AWS environments. Must know IAM, GuardDuty, Security Hub, and Zero Trust architecture. 4+ years cloud security experience.
Growth Marketing Analyst with experience in data analytics and marketing tools. Must know Google Analytics, SQL basics, and have a data-driven approach to campaign optimization. 2+ years experience.
